title: The CPIMP Backdoor: Anatomy of a Multi-Chain Proxy Attack
description:
Yannis Smaragdakis, Co-Founder, Dedaub

A deep dive into the CPIMP vulnerability—how a stealthy proxy-in-the-middle infected dozens of DeFi protocols, and how Dedaub and SEAL 911 raced to neutralize it before widespread exploitation.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/schedule
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Nogal Stage - Day 1
